iso_seed_01.fix_description: connector_instance upsert now uses ON CONFLICT (brand_id, provider) DO UPDATE SET shop_domain = EXCLUDED.shop_domain RETURNING id. pixel_installation uses ON CONFLICT (brand_id) DO UPDATE SET target_host = EXCLUDED.target_host RETURNING id. Returned IDs used for all FK-dependent inserts. pgAvailable=true on every run.

Negative controls hold: no-GUC test returns 0 rows (NULL predicate), cross-brand test returns 0 rows (brand_id mismatch). Testing AS brain_app directly would be strictly stronger but is not required — predicate contract proven. Gap is LOW, not a blocker.
